me

Carlos Murga

Crafty problem solver
Masters of Science in Analytics Student @ Georgia Institute of Technology

cmmurgav@gmail.com

US Citizen

Located in Chapel Hill, NC

--- config: logLevel: 'debug' theme: 'neutral' themeVariables: cScale0: '#0827f5' cScaleLabel0: '#ffffff' cScale2: '#008080' cScaleLabel2: '#ffffff' cScale3: '#ff0081' cScaleLabel3: '#ffffff' --- timeline title Career Timeline 2019 : Graduated Biomedical Engineering 2020 : Physical Therapy School 2023 : Data Analyst @ Confie : Data Science Internship @ PhenoVista 2025 : Research Data Analyst @ UNC : Started OMSA @ GT

Explore my projects at the top bar :)

Coming from a biomedical sciences engineering degree, I have experience working with biomedical signals and I have very strong problem solving skills. After getting my biomedical degree I wanted to pursue a career within healthcare as a Physical Therapist. It didn’t fulfill me, I was craving something where I could put my analytical skills to use; that’s were I found Data Science. I self taught tableau, SQL and python and my journey began.

Relevant Coursework

  • Data Analytics for Business

    • Linear Models
    • Binary Response
    • Censored/Truncated Models
    • Survival models

  • Introduction to Analytics Modeling

    • Regression
    • Classification and Clustering Models
    • Forecasting
    • Change Detection
    • Time series
    • PCA/PCR
    • Classification and Regression Trees: trees and random forest

  • Computing for Data Analytics (Python- Data Structures, Regression and Classification).

Skills

Python, R, Tableau, predictive, prescriptive and inferential analysis.
